reforms.description: The Australian government's 'Smart Cities Plan' aims to provide greater federal support and guidance for developing and implementing technological solutions to urban issues, including co-financing for technology-based projects through the 'Smart Cities and Suburbs Programme' with a commitment of AUD 28.5 million. This initiative focuses on smart investment, policy, and technology to improve urban environments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance urban infrastructure and technology, which can lead to increased productivity and improved living conditions.
reforms.status_evidence: The program has been actively providing funding for projects aimed at improving urban environments.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant investment in urban technology but does not constitute a major overhaul of existing systems.
reforms.source_quote: The federal government is implementing the 'Smart Cities Plan', which aims to provide greater federal-government support and steerage on developing and implementing technological solutions to infrastructure and other issues in urban areas.

reforms.description: The Australian government announced a significant AUD 2.4 billion investment in research, science, and technology capabilities as part of the 2018-19 Budget, aligning with the recommendations from the report 'Australia 2030 Prosperity through Innovation'. This funding reform aims to enhance the overall research and development landscape in Australia.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The substantial investment is expected to boost R&D activities, leading to innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The funding has been allocated and is being utilized for various R&D initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major structural change in public funding for R&D in Australia.
reforms.source_quote: The government - under the Quality Schools package - will be gradually increasing the total funding and altering allocation formulae for federal-government grants to schools.

reforms.description: Reforms to the R&D Tax Incentive aim to enhance its effectiveness in promoting new R&D activities while improving program integrity and administration. The government has announced a refocus of the incentive towards supporting high-intensity R&D to better align with public funding objectives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the R&D Tax Incentive, the government aims to stimulate private sector investment in R&D, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently in effect, with adjustments made to the R&D Tax Incentive.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in how R&D tax incentives are structured and administered.
reforms.source_quote: Recent policy moves have included announced reforms to refocus the R&D Tax Incentive towards supporting high-intensity R&D.

reforms.description: Progress has been made in reforming intellectual property legislation to better support innovation and protect creators' rights, which is essential for fostering a competitive business environment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved intellectual property protections can encourage innovation and investment in new technologies.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been discussed and are in the process of being developed.
reforms.importance_rationale: While important, the reforms do not represent a major overhaul of the intellectual property system.
reforms.source_quote: Progress in reforming intellectual property legislation has been noted.

reforms.description: Australia established the Try, Test and Learn Fund to test the effectiveness of innovative policies aimed at raising labour market participation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to foster innovative approaches to improve labour market outcomes, which can enhance economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund has been proposed and is in the process of being established.
reforms.importance_rationale: The fund represents a significant initiative but does not constitute a major reform of the overall labour market system.
reforms.source_quote: Australia recently adopted an investment approach... and established the Try, Test and Learn Fund to be used towards testing the effectiveness of innovative policies in raising labour market participation.

reforms.description: Australia should establish an independent institution to coordinate, source, and generate the development of a national research and evidence base to support more evidence-based decision-making in school education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Creating a national research institution can enhance the quality of research and evidence used in policy-making, leading to better educational outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal for the institution has been made and is under consideration.
reforms.importance_rationale: While important, the establishment of this institution does not represent a major overhaul of the research infrastructure.
reforms.source_quote: Australia should establish an independent institution to coordinate, source and generate the development of a national research and evidence base to support more evidence-based decision making in school education.

reforms.description: The federal government has taken steps to restore confidence and stability to the VET sector by replacing the VET FEE-HELP scheme with the VET Student Loans program, which includes stronger controls and loan caps.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to improve the quality and accessibility of vocational education and training, which can enhance the skills of the workforce.
reforms.status_evidence: The new VET Student Loans program is currently in operation, replacing the previous scheme.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the funding and structure of vocational education in Australia.
reforms.source_quote: In 2017 the VET Student Loans program replaced the VET FEE-HELP scheme, and includes stronger controls regarding who can offer courses funded by loans.

reforms.description: Australia is encouraging autonomous vehicle trials through legislative changes and partnerships, aiming to advance readiness for self-driving technology in urban environments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating trials for autonomous vehicles can lead to advancements in transportation technology and urban mobility solutions.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been proposed and is in the process of being developed.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the initiative does not represent a major overhaul of transportation policy.
reforms.source_quote: Legislation allowing automated vehicles trials passed 2018.
